task_completion.description: Create the first Simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE Supervisor window showing a running 'Simulated Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter.

task_completion.description: Create the second Simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapter for redundancy.
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenICE Supervisor window showing a second running 'Simulated Multiparameter Monitor' device adapter alongside the first.

task_completion.description: Launch the Vital Signs application and verify simultaneous data streaming.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs application window is open, displaying data/waveforms from two distinct Multiparameter Monitor sources simultaneously.

task_completion.description: Simulate a device failure of one of the Multiparameter Monitors.
task_completion.visual_evidence: One of the device adapters is stopped, closed, or shows a disconnected state in the Supervisor or Vital Signs app, while the other continues to stream data.

task_completion.description: Restore full redundancy by restarting or recreating the failed device adapter.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Both Simulated Multiparameter Monitor device adapters are running again and actively streaming data in the Vital Signs app.

task_completion.description: Document the system's response to the failure in a validation report.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal open showing the file '/home/ga/Desktop/fault_tolerance_report.txt' containing notes about detection, monitoring continuity, and visual indicators.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenICE Supervisor GUI to create devices and launch apps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenICE Supervisor interface being actively interacted with (e.g., clicking buttons to add devices or launch apps).

integrity.description: Agent actually opened the Vital Signs application to observe the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Vital Signs application window is visible in at least one screenshot with active waveforms/data, proving the agent didn't just guess the system's behavior.

integrity.description: The report file was created based on actual observations.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor is open editing 'fault_tolerance_report.txt' with content that reflects the actual events seen in the GUI, rather than a generic pre-written script.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 2 'Simulated Multiparameter Monitor' device adapters in OpenICE. The agent must launch the 'Vital Signs' application to view the data. The final report must be saved to '/home/ga/Desktop/fault_tolerance_report.txt'. The passing threshold is 60/100 points. The data is synthetic, not real patient data.
